feature: Review and Fix Report Architecture Issues (Iterative AI Agent Loop)
description:
激活AI架构师，评估report代码架构及逻辑流程，修复三个最严重的问题，激活AI新闻分析师，分析最终新闻质量并反馈给AI架构师

uv run feedship --debug report --since 2026-04-07 --until 2026-04-10 --language zh
workflow_rationale: The task is a 100-iteration feedback loop: AI Architect evaluates code and fixes top 3 most severe problems per iteration; AI News Analyst evaluates report quality and routes feedback back. This is a multi-round refinement workflow requiring phased execution: investigation, iterative fix cycles, and QA validation.

phases.name: AI Architect Code Review
phases.description: AI Architect evaluates report code architecture (src/application/report.py, src/llm/chains.py, src/cli/report.py) and produces a prioritized list of issues. Known pre-existing bugs: async event loop misuse in _translate_title_sync, translate_report, render_report_v2.

subtasks.description: AI Architect reviews src/application/report.py for async/event loop issues, DB write safety, clustering logic

verification.instructions: AI Architect reviews code and outputs a structured issue list with: (1) severity, (2) file path, (3) line range, (4) root cause, (5) proposed fix. Issues documented in iteration_issues.json.

subtasks.notes: AI Architect reviewed src/application/report.py (1186 lines) and identified 5 issues: (1) HIGH asyncio.new_event_loop() dead code in translate_report, (2) HIGH get_event_loop().run_until_complete() unsafe pattern, (3) HIGH IndexError in dedup.py _level3_embedding_dedup, (4) MEDIUM duplicate articles in merged clusters, (5) LOW O(n²) centroid computation. DB write safety is CORRECT. Full structured issue list in iteration_issues.json.

subtasks.description: AI Architect reviews src/llm/chains.py for LCEL chain correctness, prompt quality, and missing chains

verification.instructions: AI Architect outputs chain-specific issues: (1) prompt quality problems, (2) missing chains for report features, (3) LCEL interface issues. Added to iteration_issues.json.

subtasks.notes: AI Architect reviewed src/llm/chains.py (205 lines) and identified 6 issues. (1) HIGH: evaluator-001 — EVALUATE_PROMPT asks for 0.0-1.0 scores but evaluator.py divides by 100 — corrupts quality scores. (2) MEDIUM: chains-001 — AsyncLLMWrapper.invoke() uses asyncio.run() which crashes in nested async context. (3) MEDIUM: chains-002 — hardcoded max_tokens=300 too low for get_layer_summary_chain() (needs 500+) and get_translate_chain() (needs 1000+). (4) LOW: chains-003 — all 5 chain getter functions lack return type annotations. (5) LOW: chains-004 — TOPIC_TITLE_PROMPT contradictory 10-20 char vs max-20-char limits. (6) LOW: chains-005 — get_evaluate_chain() uses StrOutputParser with no JSON validation. All 6 issues documented in iteration_issues.json (total_issues=11). Git commit blocked by worktree isolation — changes written to iteration_issues.json only.

subtasks.description: AI Architect reviews src/cli/report.py for CLI wrapper correctness and src/application/dedup.py for deduplication correctness

verification.instructions: AI Architect outputs CLI and dedup issues. Added to iteration_issues.json. If no issues found, documents 'no issues' for that file.

subtasks.notes: AI Architect reviewed src/cli/report.py and src/application/dedup.py. Key findings: (1) INFO: report-003 IndexError claim is a FALSE POSITIVE — Python simulation confirmed current dedup.py loop is correct (emb_idx only increments for with-embedding articles, bounds always respected). top_3_issues_for_phase_2 updated accordingly. (2) LOW cli-001: Path import at line 151 violates PEP 8. (3) LOW cli-002: sys.exit(1) in template error bypasses outer exception handler. (4) LOW cli-003: ctx parameter unused. (5) LOW dedup-001: unused signature_map in _level2_minhash_dedup. (6) INFO dedup-002: id_to_embedding is NOT dead code. (7) LOW dedup-003: redundant import in preload_embedding_model. (8) LOW vector-001: get_chroma_collection missing return type. (9) LOW vector-002: _check_memory_guard name semantically inverted. (10) INFO vector-003: _check_memory_guard AND condition too permissive. Added cli_dedup_issues array (10 entries) to iteration_issues.json. total_issues=16.

subtasks.description: Document all findings in iteration_issues.json with severity ranking

phases.name: AI Architect Iteration 1 — Fix Top 3 Issues
phases.description: AI Architect applies fixes for the top 3 most severe issues identified in Phase 1. Known high-severity issues: (1) asyncio.run_until_complete() in _translate_title_sync (line 447), (2) asyncio.new_event_loop() in translate_report (line 1154), (3) nested asyncio.run() in render functions.

subtasks.description: Fix Issue #1: Replace asyncio.get_event_loop().run_until_complete() in _translate_title_sync with fully async approach
Fix Issue #2: Replace asyncio.new_event_loop() nested in asyncio.run() in translate_report with proper async approach
Fix Issue #3: Replace nested asyncio.run() calls in render_report and render_report_v2 with async batch translation approach

verification.expected: At most 2 matches (in cluster_articles_for_report and cluster_articles_for_report_v2 entry points only)

subtasks.description: Fix additional issues (top 4-6) if Phase 1 found them; otherwise document that no additional high-severity issues exist

verification.command: uv run ruff check src/application/report.py src/llm/chains.py 2>&1 | grep -E 'error' | head -10

phases.name: AI Architect Iterative Loop (Iterations 2–100)
phases.description: Iterative loop: (1) AI Architect identifies top 3 remaining unfixed issues, (2) applies fixes, (3) AI News Analyst evaluates report quality and returns scores, (4) scores routed back to AI Architect for next iteration. Continues up to 100 iterations or until AI Architect reports no remaining critical issues.

subtasks.description: Iteration N: AI Architect reviews remaining unfixed issues from iteration_issues.json, selects top 3, applies fixes

verification.command: uv run feedship --debug report --since 2026-04-07 --until 2026-04-10 --language zh 2>&1 | head -5
verification.expected: No traceback errors; report generates or exits gracefully with 'No articles found'

subtasks.description: Iteration N: AI News Analyst evaluates generated report quality using evaluate_report_enhanced; returns coherence/relevance/depth/structure scores

verification.instructions: AI News Analyst reviews report output and returns structured scores. Scores recorded in iteration_scores.json. Scores must be in range 0.0-1.0.

subtasks.description: Iteration N: Route AI News Analyst scores back to AI Architect; update iteration_issues.json with new priority ordering based on quality feedback
Loop termination check: if AI Architect reports no critical issues remaining OR iteration count reaches 100, end loop

verification.instructions: If iteration count >= 100 OR no critical issues remain: end loop and proceed to Phase 4. Otherwise: increment iteration counter, go back to subtask-3-1.

phases.name: QA Validation
phases.description: Final QA validation: run report CLI, run tests, verify no regressions, verify pre-commit passes.

subtasks.description: Run report CLI command (v1 and v2 templates) and verify no errors

verification.command: uv run feedship --debug report --since 2026-04-07 --until 2026-04-10 --language zh 2>&1 | tail -10
verification.expected: Report renders OR graceful 'No articles found' — no traceback

subtasks.description: Run pytest test suite and verify all tests pass
Run pre-commit hooks and verify no failures
Verify no sync-DB-inside-gather or asyncio loop misuse patterns introduced

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential execution — each phase depends on previous phase completion

summary.startup_command: cd /Users/y3/feedship && uv run feedship --debug report --since 2026-04-07 --until 2026-04-10 --language zh

acceptance_criteria: Report CLI runs without errors on specified date range
No sync-DB-inside-gather or asyncio loop misuse patterns introduced
AI Architect / AI News Analyst loop produces documented quality scores per iteration

verification_steps.name: Report CLI (v2)
verification_steps.command: uv run feedship --debug report --since 2026-04-07 --until 2026-04-10 --language zh --template v2
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Report renders v2 template without traceback errors

verification_steps.name: Async Safety Audit
verification_steps.expected_outcome: No matches (all async loop misuse fixed)

verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk: modifies async code in report pipeline. No new external dependencies, no schema changes, no security-sensitive code. Unit/integration tests + CLI verification sufficient. The AI agent loop is self-validating through AI News Analyst quality scores.
